hero.headline: Built for the curious
hero.subtitle: Describe your raw project idea. Our AI will comprehend it, confirm with you, then run deep market research and autopilot strategy.
hero.cameraAria: Attach a photo of your idea
hero.shareText: Scout your project ideas with AI on isee.
hero.shareFailed: Could not share. Try copying the URL from the address bar.
hero.imageHint: [Visual reference attached: {{name}} — describe what the image shows in your idea.]

confirm.title: AI Comprehension
confirm.subtitle: Review how we understood your idea. Confirm to run deep research, or refine below.
confirm.refinementPlaceholder: e.g. "Focus on European markets instead of US"

dashboard.title: Analytical Dashboard
dashboard.loadError: Something went wrong loading your dashboard.

saveBoard.title: Save Board
saveBoard.empty: No saved scouts yet. Submit an idea to begin.

llm.noPlatformModels: No platform models. Use your key.
llm.verifyToLoad: Verify your key to load available models.

errors.enterApiKey: Please enter your API key in AI Model settings.
errors.keyChecking: Your API key is still being verified. Please wait.
errors.keyInvalid: Please verify your API key is valid before scouting.
errors.noPlatformModels: No isee models available. Switch to Your API Key mode and enter your key.
errors.timeoutUnderstand: Request timed out. Render may be waking up — try again in a minute.
errors.timeoutAnalyze: Deep research timed out. The server may still be waking up — wait 30s and try again.
errors.incompleteAnalysis: AI returned an incomplete analysis. Please try again.
errors.modelsLoadProd: Could not load isee models. Redeploy Netlify after setting VITE_API_URL, or check Render is running.
errors.modelsLoadDev: Could not load models. Is the server running?
errors.enterKeyToVerify: Enter an API key to verify.
errors.verifyFailed: Could not verify key. Is the server running?
